tools.name: archive.getYearMonthJson
tools.description: The Archive API provides lists of NYT articles by month going back to 1851.  Simply pass in the year and month you want and it returns a JSON object with all articles for that month.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
